headline: Keysight Introduces 220 GHz Lightwave Component Analyzer to Validate Next-Generation Optical Transceiver Technology
summary: SANTA ROSA, Calif., March 12, 2026--New analyzer accelerates design and validation of 1.6/3.2 Tb/s optical transmitter and receiver components for high-speed optical interconnects.

headline: Salience Labs and Keysight Collaborate to Develop First Optical Circuit Switch Testing Environment
summary: OXFORD, England, March 12, 2026--Salience Labs Limited, a leader in photonic solutions targeting connectivity for AI datacenter infrastructure, and Keysight Technologies, Inc. (NYSE: KEYS), today announced a strategic collaboration to develop the first optical circuit switch (OCS) testing environment. This collaboration positions Keysight as the leader in OCS testing and measurement, establishing it as the expert in how silicon photonics is advancing the performance and reliability of AI workloa

headline: Keysight Expands AI Data Center Testing As Valuation Premium Draws Scrutiny
summary: Keysight Technologies (NYSE:KEYS) rolled out the AresONE 1600GE platform to test next generation AI data center fabrics, targeting 224G SerDes and 1.6T Ethernet workloads. The company introduced its Functional Interconnect Test Solutions (FITS) portfolio, including the FITS-8CH tool for system level testing of high speed interconnects in large network deployments. Keysight expanded interoperability between its hardware and 3dB Labs' Sceptre RF signal analysis software, supporting multi...

headline: The Zacks Analyst Blog  Vertiv, HubSpot, Dell, Keysight and Cognex
summary: AI infrastructure stocks have rallied despite tech-sector headwinds. VRT, HUBS, DELL, KEYS and CGNX surged in the past month and carry favorable ranks signaling further upside.
